headline: LandBridge & Texas Pacific Land: The Picks-And-Shovels Of The West Texas AI Boom
summary: Texas Pacific Land is shifting to an AI data center land play, but its valuation prices in too much GW growth. Read why TPL stock is a Sell and LB stock is a Buy.
